description:
Configure the Local Emergency Planning Committee (LEPC) jurisdiction settings in CAMEO Data Manager using the following details:

- LEPC Name: Cuyahoga County Local Emergency Planning Committee
- State: OH
- County: Cuyahoga
- Address: 323 Lakeside Avenue West
- City: Cleveland
- Zip: 44113
- Phone: (216) 443-5700
- LEPC Chairperson: Emergency Management Director
- Fire District/Jurisdiction: Cuyahoga County Emergency Services

Enter and save these details in the jurisdiction configuration area of the database.

metadata.expected_lepc_name: Cuyahoga County Local Emergency Planning Committee
